threshold_source: training-period percentile of max(ERI_3h, ERI_6h, ERI_9h) computed Nov 10-Dec 31 2023

action_label: Heighten alert; duty officer should increase check-in frequency
triggers: max_ERI in [0.0604, 0.3135)  OR  CI_half >= zone_ci_narrow_threshold[zone]  (wide vs zone's own p25)
threshold_source: training-period percentile of max(ERI_3h, ERI_6h, ERI_9h) computed Nov 10-Dec 31 2023

action_label: Pre-position tow unit near zone; standby for rapid deployment
threshold_source: training-period percentile of max(ERI_3h, ERI_6h, ERI_9h) computed Nov 10-Dec 31 2023

action_label: Move barricading equipment to zone perimeter; notify junction marshals
triggers: max_ERI >= 0.3135  AND  SSC_norm >= 0.5  AND  persistence != transient
threshold_source: training-period percentile of max(ERI_3h, ERI_6h, ERI_9h) computed Nov 10-Dec 31 2023

action_label: Alert traffic control; identify and pre-clear alternate routes
triggers: max_ERI >= 0.5097  AND  SSC_norm >= 0.5  AND  persistence != transient
threshold_source: training-period percentile of max(ERI_3h, ERI_6h, ERI_9h) computed Nov 10-Dec 31 2023

action_label: Senior officer response required; activate diversion plan immediately
triggers: max_ERI >= 0.8535  AND  persistence == escalating  AND  CI_half < zone_ci_narrow_threshold[zone]  (zone-relative narrow)
threshold_source: training-period percentile of max(ERI_3h, ERI_6h, ERI_9h) computed Nov 10-Dec 31 2023
